tagline: Build, test, and publish Pneuma modes

highlights.title: Overview Dashboard
highlights.description: See your mode's completeness at a glance — manifest, viewer, skill, seed — with expandable cards showing each component's details.

highlights.title: Fork & Play
highlights.description: Import any builtin mode as a starting point. Hit Play to launch a test instance in a temp workspace — instant feedback without leaving the editor.

highlights.title: One-Click Publish
highlights.description: Package your mode and upload to the Pneuma registry. Share with a single command — version conflicts detected automatically.
